_comment: Trusted-release set for runner attestation (G1a / ADR-0017 / ADR-0018). NON-.py ON PURPOSE: compute_source_tree_hash globs only *.py, so editing this file does NOT change the source-tree hash — that dissolves the self-referential fixed point that made `+ RUNNER ATTESTED` unreachable. The verification LOGIC stays in release.py (hash-covered, tamper-evident); this is POLICY DATA. Trust model: a submitter trusts the copy that shipped in its OWN pip install, never one fetched from a queried daemon. Keyed by version; one canonical source_tree_hash per version. Empty until the first tagged release is cut via scripts/cut_release.py.
